name: Client 0324-006
history: History of long work hours in demanding work environments, including past touring work. Unresolved issues with father, including reports of past abuse. Recent exchange of letters with father addressing this history.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must handle everything on my own or I am a failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't change myself, I don't deserve to be around.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of emotions, over-reliance on self, reluctance to seek help.
situation: Reflecting on how to use idle time and focus on personal development.
auto_thought: I can't make a go of it; everything I try turns out bad.
behavior: Withdrawing from others, reluctance to seek help, feeling overwhelmed by responsibilities.
